facts.what: Deviation during low-level leg before IP Bravo.
facts.why: Task saturation and delayed cross-check between PF/PM.
facts.where: Training area West Corridor, 12 NM north of IP Bravo.
facts.how: Heading drift + late correction, no safety impact.
facts.narrative: Mission remained safe. Crew recovered rapidly after re-brief in flight and resumed profile with tighter callouts.

analysis.content: Primary issue was crew coordination under workload. Trigger was compressed timeline and incomplete role delegation before entering the segment.

recos.doctrine: Standardize pre-segment role call and decision gates.
recos.organisation: Assign explicit PM challenge windows every 2 minutes.
recos.equipements: Use heading trend cue on primary display earlier.
recos.soutien: Prepare mission card with critical checkpoints highlighted.
recos.entrainement: Run dedicated simulator drill on high workload navigation.

qwi.advice: Good recovery. Next sortie: prioritize anticipation brief before each tactical leg and enforce verbal cross-check rhythm.
